name: UAC Bypass Attempt
description: Detects potential User Account Control bypass techniques on Windows
query:
// UAC Bypass Detection
// Common UAC bypass techniques
events from endpoint
where (process_name = "eventvwr.exe" and parent_process_name != "explorer.exe")
  or (process_name = "fodhelper.exe" and parent_process_name != "explorer.exe")
  or (process_name = "computerdefaults.exe" and parent_process_name != "explorer.exe")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
